name: Lacto: Zuccini in Mock Cream Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate the zucchini into a bowl and sprinkle with salt. Place the bowl over a pan to collect the juices, and let sit for 30-60 minutes.
2. After this period, squeeze the zucchini over the pan, reserving all juices that drip out.
3. Heat butter, olive oil, or peanut oil in a frying pan, and sauté the zucchini and garlic for 2-3 minutes.
4. While this is occurring, heat the zucchini juices to near the boiling point (this step is critical; if the juices are not hot, the sauce will not thicken).
5. Make a well in the center of the zucchini mixture, heat the butter/Crisco for a few seconds, then add the flour and stir together.
6. After 1 more minute, add the hot zucchini juices to the well and stir for 30 seconds to create a thick sauce.
7. Mix everything together, adding pepper and optional cheese if desired.
This recipe is quick and easy, yet deliciously rich with a creamy sauce without using any cream or butter (if using Crisco).
